prompt: Complete bitcnt_tb.sv as a self-checking SystemVerilog testbench for bitcnt.v. The DUT implements CLZ64, CLZ32, CTZ64, CTZ32, CNT64, and CNT32 selected by din_func 000 through 101. Verify every operation, including all-zero inputs and the rule that 32-bit modes ignore din_data[63:32]. The testbench module must be named testbench, print PASS on success, call $fatal on a mismatch, and finish. The verifier will run it against the reference design and mutation variants.
instruction: Write a mutation-sensitive self-checking testbench in bitcnt_tb.sv.
